basicDetails.schemeName: IT Policy and Amendments-2020 - Information Technology Development Agency

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The policy “IT Policy and Amendments-2020” is implemented by the Information Technology Development Agency (ITDA) under Department of Information Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote the growth of IT, ITES, Internet Service Provider, and Telecom Service Provider industries in Uttarakhand by supporting startups, and creating employment opportunities for local youth through policy incentives and initiatives.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under the IT Policy, the focus is on promoting the IT and IT Enabled Services (ITES) sectors, as well as the Internet Service Provider and Telecom Service Provider industries in the state, by encouraging investment through various beneficial schemes and policy incentives offered by the Industries Department.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The policy aims to promote the growth of IT, ITES, Internet Service Provider, and Telecom Service Provider industries in Uttarakhand by supporting startups, and creating employment opportunities for local youth through policy incentives and initiatives.

children.text: The policy “IT Policy and Amendments-2020” is implemented by the Information Technology Development Agency (ITDA) under Department of Information Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote the growth of IT, ITES, Internet Service Provider, and Telecom Service Provider industries in Uttarakhand by supporting startups, and creating employment opportunities for local youth through policy incentives and initiatives.

Under the IT Policy, the focus is on promoting the IT and IT Enabled Services (ITES) sectors, as well as the Internet Service Provider and Telecom Service Provider industries in the state, by encouraging investment through various beneficial schemes and policy incentives offered by the Industries Department.

The benefits under this policy can be availed through the Information Technology Development Agency (ITDA), an organization under the State’s IT Department. Beneficiaries can receive subsidies and other incentives as per the procedures prescribed by the State’s Industries Department.

applicationProcess.process_md: The benefits under this policy can be availed through the Information Technology Development Agency (ITDA), an organization under the State’s IT Department. Beneficiaries can receive subsidies and other incentives as per the procedures prescribed by the State’s Industries Department.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. IT, ITES, Internet Service Providers, Telecom Service Providers, IT-based industries, investors, startups, and youth from Uttarakhand are eligible to avail of the benefits offered under the policy.

children.text: IT, ITES, Internet Service Providers, Telecom Service Providers, IT-based industries, investors, startups, and youth from Uttarakhand are eligible to avail of the benefits offered under the policy.
